title: Daedalus Corporation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Daedalus Corporation''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company. They worked mining ores in the [[Grilliss]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[Atrig system]]. Around [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Daedalus was employing [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] labor to dig for [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] ores without proper protection, and selling them on to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
